title: phebalium alpinum
intro: Phebalium alpinum, also known as the Alpine Phebalium, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial actions. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Phebalium alpinum is often prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
